news.t: Amplify ETFs Launches the Amplify Samsung U.S. Natural Gas Infrastructure ETF (USNG)

holdings.infoBox: USNG is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Solaris Energy Infrastructure stock at 10.45%, Bloom Energy at 8.16%, The Williams Companies at 8.02%, Kinder Morgan at 7.09%, and Enbridge at 6.98%.

overview.description: The Amplify Samsung U.S. Natural Gas Infrastructure ETF (USNG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio of US-listed companies involved in the upstream, midstream, and downstream categories of the natural gas industry. USNG was launched on May 20, 2025 and is issued by Amplify Investments.

data.title: Amplify ETFs Launches the Amplify Samsung U.S. Natural Gas Infrastructure ETF (USNG)
data.text: CHICAGO, May 20, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) --  Amplify ETFs is pleased to announce the launch of the Amplify Samsung U.S. Natural Gas Infrastructure ETF (USNG) in collaboration with Samsung Asset Manageme...
